Wraps · Lunch
Pesto Chicken Wrap
Grilled chicken breast, basil pesto, marinated feta, fresh lettuce and tomato in a soft tortilla
FJD$33
Price
1×
Portions
8 min
Prep
12 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Wrap
Flour tortilla 12"each1
Protein
Chicken breast, grilledg120
Sauce
Basil pestog30
Filling
Marinated fetag40
Iceberg lettuce, shreddedg30
Tomato, slicedg40
Method
1
Season chicken, grill 5–6 min each side to 75°C core.
2
Rest 2 min, slice on bias.
3
Lay tortilla flat. Spread pesto across centre.
4
Layer lettuce, tomato, sliced chicken, and crumbled feta.
5
Fold sides in, roll tightly. Cut on 45° angle.
6
Plate with fries.
Plating Notes
Cut on diagonal. Feta visible at cut face. Fries alongside.
Equipment
Grill · Probe thermometer · Serrated knife
Allergens
GLUTEN DAIRY TREE NUTS
EGGS PEANUTS SHELLFISH FISH SOY SESAME CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
